description_long: This is a full-size black keyboard with a standard QWERTY layout, including a numeric keypad on the right and a row of function keys along the top. The keys are low-profile and rectangular, with white printed legends for easy visibility. The surface is matte, reducing glare and fingerprints, and the chassis is slim and lightweight, likely made of durable plastic. The keyboard features a visible Logitech logo in the upper right corner, indicating its brand. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, suggesting it may be wireless or the connection is not shown. The overall design is modern and professional, suitable for office or home use.
description: A full-size black Logitech keyboard with a numeric keypad, matte finish, and white key legends. The design is slim, modern, and professional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the main typing area, function keys, and numeric keypad.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the keyboard's slim profile and the Logitech logo on the top right corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge and the overall rectangular shape, with the logo visible on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and the arrangement of the keys from a different angle.
